profile.name: Tony Lau
profile.tagline: Infrastructure investor turned software engineer. I build at the intersection of finance and technology — from AI video production to blockchain infrastructure to fintech education.

stats.label: years in infrastructure finance — from solar assets to nuclear energy.
GitHub repositories spanning AI agents, blockchain, DeFi, and full-stack apps.
degrees from Schulich — BBA, Master of Finance, Master of Law.

experience.title: Instructor — Fintech: Digital Transformation
experience.desc: Teaching graduate course FINE6280 on fintech and digital transformation of financial services to 40 students.

experience.title: Manager — Corporate Development
experience.desc: M&A and new project development across nuclear, real estate, and renewable energy.

experience.title: Senior Financial Analyst — Shop Pay & Shop App
experience.desc: Financial modelling for Shop App marketplace. Built business cases and launched the Shop Cash Loyalty Program.

experience.title: Senior Manager — Green Infrastructure Investments
experience.desc: Due diligence on equity/debt investments in Canadian infrastructure — transmission, district energy, SMRs.

experience.title: Senior Manager — Corporate Development
experience.desc: M&A and acquisition of private companies. Closed a $150M private placement for water heater portfolio.

experience.title: Senior Analyst — Private Investments, Infrastructure
experience.desc: Built complex financial models for acquisition underwriting and financing. Managed portfolio companies.

experience.title: Analyst — Investments, Infrastructure
experience.desc: Fundraising and acquisition of solar assets (>50 MW). Transactions across Europe, US wind, UK airports.

featured.name: CYM Studio
featured.tagline: AI video production + gasless gift-card redemption on Conflux eSpace
featured.desc: Full-stack platform for AI-powered video production with an integrated rewards system. Tournament winners redeem real-world gift cards across 300+ brands using USDT0 — no gas needed.

grid.name: Nanobot

grid.name: Pulse520

grid.name: Open Design

grid.name: Trailer Maker
grid.desc: Concept-to-theatrical-trailer pipeline. Claude + Seedance 2.0 + ffmpeg with human-in-the-loop review.

grid.name: Conflux Bounties

grid.name: Schulich FINE6280
